Hello everyone and welcome back to Joom Launch Training. So this section is all about sales. We've received a lot of notoriety in our selling process and a lot of people consider it to be one of our core competencies and our ability to transfer that skill to other people so that they can sell and do so well. So Joom in Effort has gone into simplifying this selling system so that anyone can do it and they can learn it quickly. So just from an overview standpoint, the sales process is everything that happens from the time someone shows up to the time they give you money. And that's important not from the time they sign the contract. Everything that happens from the time they show until the money actually clears the account. So you're always selling. You're just like on the phone when you're selling the appointment. You're selling when you're marketing, you're selling when you're fulfilling, you're constantly selling. But just for the purposes of this training, it's going to be how to really manage the conversation so that we can turn prospects who walk through the door into closed sales.
